form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after two months won by 1.3 len at Nakayama Dirt March 22 over 1200m defeating Move carrying 56.0kg at $4. Previously second-up 8th of 16 at Hanshin Dirt on December 6 over 1200m, 6 len behind Femme Elegante carrying 57.0kg at $3.30. Can continue his winning ways. Improver with winning prospects.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of three months. Finished off last campaign to post a big 5 len win. This track January 14 over 1200m defeating Verdad Imeru with 58kg at $2.80. Previously first up; second last of 13 at Urawa December 23 over 1400m, 17 len behind Moueix with 57kg at $4.10. Should run well.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. Comes off a 60 day let-up. First-up 2nd of 16 at Nakayama Dirt in the G3 Capella Stakes on December 14 over 1200m, 5 len behind T O Elvis with 58.0kg at $4.90. Second run from a spell second last of 13 at Riyadh Dirt in the SAUG2 SAUG2 RIYADH DIRT SPRINT on February 14 over 1200m, 19 len behind Imagination carrying 57kg at $13. Expected to perform well.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after 10 months was well back until straightening; raced back then made ground from the turn; won by 1.3 len at this track March 26 over 1200m defeating Hulm with 56kg at $40.60. Previously second-up 12th of 15 at this track on April 16 over 1200m, 6 len behind A Tracks carrying 56kg at $120.90. Should progress from that first-up run.
